StyledText.Data: Warning! Be very careful when changing a Package Codebase!

Calculation.Text: Not PatternCount ( Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Short name ; "version" )
Not PatternCount ( Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Short name ; "version" )

LayoutObject.name: JSON export

Calculation.Text: FAT Export Log @ Package::Package id = FAT Package::PrimaryKey /*and PatternCount ( Remote Export Log @ Package::Export Mode Explained ; "content" )*/
PatternCount ( FAT Export Log @ Package::Export Mode Explained ; "code" )
PatternCount ( FAT Export Log @ Package::Export Mode Explained ; "code" )
PatternCount ( FAT Export Log @ Package::Export Mode Explained ; "code" )
PatternCount ( FAT Export Log @ Package::Export Mode Explained ; "code" )
PatternCount ( FAT Export Log @ Package::Export Mode Explained ; "code" )
